name_cn:
Pochette Métis #M44875# Non-inspected Version
▪️Size: 25*19*7cm▪️
Classic work—Postman bag details, timeless classic, also known as the 'entry-level postman bag'
Versatility beyond imagination, classic monogram fabric, giving an eternal vibe. From its birth to the present, from a bestseller to a classic, it has always been deeply loved. Simple and classic styling! Original factory color-changing material, plus our exclusive French original material, full steel hardware. This is a bulk production piece with ZP visual appeal.
